name: pbes
description: Plan Big, Execute Small: verified multi-agent orchestration for Codex with a generated arsenal of approximately 90 skills.

interface.shortDescription: Verified orchestration for broad agent work
interface.longDescription: Plan broad work, delegate bounded assignments, verify evidence, and use an arsenal of approximately 90 generated Codex-compatible skills.
defaultPrompt: Use PBES to investigate this project in parallel.
